basic_details.job_title: PM SHRI KV Sundargarh Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for TGT, Vocational Trainer and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: TGT, Counselor, Regional Language Teacher, Vocational Trainer
basic_details.short_information: PM SHRI Kendriya Vidyalaya Sundargarh has released the official TGT, Counselor, Regional Language Teacher, and Vocational Trainer Notification 2026 for contractual positions. The recruitment details have been announced under the PM SHRI KV Sundargarh Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with qualifications including Graduate, B.Ed., CTET Qualification, Diploma in Counseling, B.E., B.Tech, and M.Tech can apply through the walk-in interview process. Candidates with a maximum age limit of 65 years are eligible to participate. Interested candidates can attend the walk-in interview on 27 July 2026

application_fee.all_fee: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 65 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate, B.Ed., CTET Qualified, Diploma in Counseling, B.E, B.Tech/ M.Tech
qualification.details: TGT: Four years integrated degree course from NCTE recognized Institution/ University with at least 50% marks in the concerned subject(s) as well as in the aggregate including B.Ed. component OR Bachelor/Honours Degree from a recognized institution/University with at least 50% marks in concerned subject, combination of subjects as well as in the aggregate. For TGT (Sanskrit): Sanskrit as a subject in all the three years. For TGT (English): English as a subject in all the three years. For TGT (S.St): Candidates should have studied any two subjects out of History, Geography, Economics and Political Science at graduation level out of which one must be either History or Geography in at least three years/ 06 Semesters in graduation/four years integrated degree course as an Elective/Main Subject and the second subject for at least one year/any two semesters. The candidates who studied under Choice Based Credit System (CBCS) with the above subject combination are also eligible to apply. For TGT (Science): The candidate should have studied Biology/Life Science/Botany/ Zoology as Honours/Main Subject in at least three years/06 Semesters in graduation/four years integrated degree course with following combination of subjects for at least one year or any 2 semesters: Main Subject: Biology/Life Science, Subsidiary Subjects: 1. Chemistry & 2.Botany or Zoology OR Main Subject: Botany, Subsidiary Subjects: 1. Chemistry & 2. Zoology OR Main Subject: Zoology, Subsidiary Subjects: 1. Chemistry & 2. Botany. The candidates who studied under Choice Based Credit System (CBCS) with the above subject combination are also eligible to apply. 50% Marks in B.Ed. in aggregate. Pass in the Central Teacher Eligibility Test (CTET), conducted by CBSE in accordance with the Guidelines framed by the NCTE for the purpose. Proficiency in teaching Hindi and English medium. Educational Counselor: B.A./B.Sc.(Psychology) with certificate of Diploma in Counseling. Regional Language Teacher (Odia): Graduation in Odia as one subject in all years of graduation as main /elective subject with B.Ed. Vocational Teacher/ Trainer: B.E, B.Tech/ M.Tech (Electronic & Communication Engineering). Minimum One Year Experience in concerned field.

salary_details.details: TGT, Counselor, Regional Language Teacher: Rs. 26,250/- per month. Vocational Trainer: Rs. 25,000/- per month.

selection_process: Online registration and application Walk-in Interview

content_sections.heading: PM SHRI KV Sundargarh Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: TGT: Four years integrated degree course from NCTE recognized Institution/ University with at least 50% marks in the concerned subject(s) as well as in the aggregate including B.Ed. component OR Bachelor/Honours Degree from a recognized institution/University with at least 50% marks in concerned subject, combination of subjects as well as in the aggregate. For TGT (Sanskrit): Sanskrit as a subject in all the three years. For TGT (English): English as a subject in all the three years. For TGT (S.St): Candidates should have studied any two subjects out of History, Geography, Economics and Political Science at graduation level out of which one must be either History or Geography in at least three years/ 06 Semesters in graduation/four years integrated degree course as an Elective/Main Subject and the second subject for at least one year/any two semesters. The candidates who studied under Choice Based Credit System (CBCS) with the above subject combination are also eligible to apply. For TGT (Science): The candidate should have studied Biology/Life Science/Botany/ Zoology as Honours/Main Subject in at least three years/06 Semesters in graduation/four years integrated degree course with following combination of subjects for at least one year or any 2 semesters: Main Subject: Biology/Life Science, Subsidiary Subjects: 1. Chemistry & 2.Botany or Zoology OR Main Subject: Botany, Subsidiary Subjects: 1. Chemistry & 2. Zoology OR Main Subject: Zoology, Subsidiary Subjects: 1. Chemistry & 2. Botany. The candidates who studied under Choice Based Credit System (CBCS) with the above subject combination are also eligible to apply. 50% Marks in B.Ed. in aggregate. Pass in the Central Teacher Eligibility Test (CTET), conducted by CBSE in accordance with the Guidelines framed by the NCTE for the purpose. Proficiency in teaching Hindi and English medium. Educational Counselor: B.A./B.Sc.(Psychology) with certificate of Diploma in Counseling. Regional Language Teacher (Odia): Graduation in Odia as one subject in all years of graduation as main /elective subject with B.Ed. Vocational Teacher/ Trainer: B.E, B.Tech/ M.Tech (Electronic & Communication Engineering). Minimum One Year Experience in concerned field.

rows.fee: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 65 years for all posts.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: TGT, Counselor, Regional Language Teacher: Rs. 26,250/- per month. Vocational Trainer: Rs. 25,000/- per month.

content_sections.heading: PM SHRI KV Sundargarh Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Selection Process
content_sections.text: Online registration and application Walk-in Interview

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for PM SHRI KV Sundargarh Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: PM SHRI KV Sundargarh Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PM SHRI KV Sundargarh recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the PM SHRI KV Sundargarh recruitment is 25 July 2026. Online registration is mandatory before attending the walk-in interview.

faq.question: Q2. What is the walk-in interview date for the announced posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the announced posts at PM SHRI KV Sundargarh is scheduled for 27 July 2026. Candidates must report at the specified time.

faq.question: Q3. What are the different posts available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: The available posts include TGT (Science, Sanskrit, English, S.St), Educational Counselor, Regional Language Teacher (Odia), and Vocational Teacher/ Trainer.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum qualification required for TGT posts?
faq.answer: For TGT posts, candidates need a four years integrated degree course or a Bachelor's degree with at least 50% marks in the concerned subject, along with a B.Ed. and CTET qualification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any experience required for the Vocational Trainer post?
faq.answer: Yes, for the Vocational Teacher/Trainer post, a minimum of one year of experience in the concerned field is required, in addition to the educational qualifications.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for the candidates applying for these positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts is 65 years. There are no specific minimum age limits mentioned for these contractual positions.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: TGT, Counselor, and Regional Language Teacher posts will receive a salary of Rs. 26,250/- per month, while Vocational Trainers will receive Rs. 25,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q8. How should candidates apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must first register and fill out the online application form on the Vidyalaya website between 18.07.2026 and 25.07.2026. Only registered candidates will be eligible for the walk-in interview.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates bring to the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must bring a printout of their online application, self-attested photocopies of all relevant documents, and original certificates for verification.

faq.question: Q10. Where is PM SHRI Kendriya Vidyalaya Sundargarh located?
faq.answer: PM SHRI Kendriya Vidyalaya Sundargarh is located in Sundargarh, Odisha, with the pincode 770020.
